name: ruby-gyoku
title: ruby-gyoku
description:
translates Ruby hashes to XML
Gyoku is a Ruby module to translate hashes to XML. It can be configured
to use convert key names to different naming conventions, convert dates,
booleans and special characters. XML attributes can be set using special
key formats.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-gyoku because translates Ruby hashes to XML.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-gyoku as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-gyoku with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-gyoku --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
